benefits.description: Lost approximately 90lbs over about a year on Tirzepatide

side_effects.description: Unable to tolerate doses higher than 7mg Tirzepatide

protocol_notes: OP has been on Tirzepatide for approximately one year at 7mg weekly. Has lost ~90lbs but is in a plateau for about a month with ~80lbs remaining to goal weight. Cannot tolerate dose increases beyond 7mg. Considering switching to Retatrutide or trying a Tirz-Reta blend. Decided to stick with Tirz for now and possibly switch to full Reta later.
